title: Eezi Move – Best of George, three years in a row!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Who we are: From an...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Who we are: From an owner-run bakkie and trailer in the 1990s, moving furniture around Pretoria, EEZI MOVE grew into one of South Africa’s most trusted names in furniture removals. Driven by our passion for helping clients and inspired by the wave of semigration to the Western Cape, we opened our George branch in 2018 to serve the serene Garden Route district.


> Our approach is simple: we see every move through our client’s eyes.


We understand moving is a stressful process, and every client has unique needs - that’s why we make every step of the journey transparent, stress-free, and EEZI-tailored just for you.

Better & Bigger StorageWe’ve moved! Our George branch has moved to a new, larger premises, giving you more space and improved security for your belongings. Equipped for short and long term storage, our new facility is owned and managed by EEZI MOVE so you can be sure your belongings are in good hands. Simple and safe, moving and storage made EEZI.

InternationalPlanning your move abroad? EEZI MOVE provides trusted worldwide relocation services. We take care of everything – from export packing, wrapping and crating, to customs clearance, shipping and delivery. Our door-to-door service ensures your belongings arrive safely, and we guide you through every step. Begin your new journey the EEZI way

More than just movingWhether it’s moving a single fridge from Wilderness to Kathu or relocating an entire luxury home from George to Gauteng, EEZI MOVE does it all.

With depots in George, Port Elizabeth, Cape Town, Durban, and Gauteng, we service all major routes daily, handling local, national, and international relocations.

At the heart of our success are our people. From drivers and porters to operations staff and consultants, every team member plays a vital role in providing exceptional service to our loyal clients.

Our team’s dedication, integrity, and passion has earned us this award once again. Guided by our team of managers and supported by all our employees, EEZI MOVE continues to grow sustainably, supporting more than 300 families across South Africa through secure and meaningful employment.

Thank you George!We are truly humbled by this recognition and want to extend our heartfelt gratitude to every Georgian who voted for us - and, most importantly, to everyone who has trusted us with their most precious belongings.

Here’s to continuing to serve all our clients with the same care, professionalism, and passion that have earned your trust time and again.

You can contact us on: 087 550 888

Thank you to everyone who has trusted us with their most precious belongings.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
